settings.heading: MORE THAN AN ORG.
settings.subtext: We are a community. A competitive powerhouse. A family. Five years of intent, trust, and relentless pursuit of excellence.

settings.heading: STARTED AS A DREAM. BECAME SOMETHING REAL.
settings.body: On April 6th, 2020, a group of high school friends with a shared vision decided to compete on the Fortnite main stage. What started as an idea grew into a multi-title competitive organisation with over 60 members, 2 million+ combined reach, and $125,000+ in confirmed prize earnings.
settings.body_2: More than just a competitive roster, Team Pulsar is a community. It is a banner that players, content creators, and fans can rally behind — a shared identity built on trust, intent, and the relentless pursuit of excellence. Pulsar is not an org people just play for; it's an org people belong to.
settings.quote: We don't work on emotion — we have intent. From the top owners to the players, everyone is on a mission to go above and beyond.

settings.heading: OUR VALUES
settings.value_1_desc: We don't settle. Every player, every piece of content, every decision reflects our commitment to being the best version of ourselves. Excellence is not a destination — it's the standard.
settings.value_2_desc: Pulsar is more than an org — it's a family. We foster a space where people connect, grow, and share in the wins and losses together. Everyone matters. Everyone is seen.
settings.value_3_desc: We don't operate on emotion — we move with purpose. Every action, from recruitment to competition, is deliberate, calculated, and aligned with our mission. Intent separates us from the noise.

settings.heading: FROM THE OWNERS
settings.intro: The people behind Team Pulsar. Known throughout the competitive scene, respected for their integrity, and personally invested in every member who carries the Pulsar name.
